release_review.summary: Patch release: consumes floe-webapp v0.36.49 Workbench context-menu add placement so pointer-selected Add actions create widgets centered on the actual selection point. No Runtime Service protocol or compatibility window changes.
release_review.same_window_rationale: The release only upgrades published Env App UI packages for Workbench pointer placement behavior. It does not add or change Runtime Service snapshot fields, sys.ping payload semantics, attach/start contracts, startup report carriers, Desktop IPC compatibility payloads, Workbench persisted layout schema versions, Env App shell readiness, or SSH bootstrap requirements, so the existing protocol version, compatibility epoch, minimum Desktop version, and minimum Runtime version remain valid.
checked_surfaces: Env App Workbench preview open request batching and runtime snapshot handoff
Env App Workbench file preview widget hydration and shared preview item lifecycle
floe-webapp Workbench context-menu add placement through published v0.36.49 packages
Desktop local runtime ownership, lease lifecycle, and open guidance
Desktop reusable loading curtain and first-screen readiness presentation
SSH runtime model broker behavior across Desktop-managed runtimes
Runtime Workbench layout schema migration and snapshot/event APIs
Desktop managed runtime start, attach, and open gating
startup report and local-ui runtime state carriers
Env App sys.ping runtime service payload
Env App desktop first-screen readiness IPC
SSH-managed runtime bootstrap and attach flow
